name: React Dojo
description: Master the art of component-based UI. From useState to useEffect, learn to build fast, reactive, and reusable interfaces the React way.

name: JavaScript Dojo
tagline: The language of the web, mastered.
description: From closures to async/await — sharpen your core JavaScript skills and understand how the language truly works under the hood.

name: CSS Dojo
description: Flexbox, Grid, animations, and design systems. Stop guessing and start building layouts with precision and confidence.

name: HTML Dojo
tagline: The foundation of everything on the web.
description: Semantic structure, accessibility, forms, and performance. HTML is not just markup — it is the skeleton of every interface you will ever build.

name: TypeScript Dojo
description: Types, interfaces, generics, and utility types. Write code that catches bugs before runtime and documents itself — the way professional teams do.

name: Git Dojo
tagline: Master the time machine of software.
description: Branching, merging, rebasing, and collaboration. Git is not just version control — it is the language of professional software development.

name: Node.js Dojo
description: Learn to build REST APIs, handle authentication, and connect to databases. Your first step into the world of backend development.
